CustomField.formula:
IF( AND(ISPICKVAL( Color__c ,"Color"),ISPICKVAL( Sided__c
,"Single")),(Qty_Used__c *
(IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Machine_Click_Charge__c),0,Material_Item__r.Machine_Click_Charge__c) +
IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Labor_Click_Charge__c) ,0,Material_Item__r.Labor_Click_Charge__c )+
IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Color_Click_Charge__c),0,Material_Item__r.Color_Click_Charge__c) +
IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Price_Per_Sheet__c),0,Material_Item__r.Price_Per_Sheet__c) ) ),
IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Color__c ,"Color"),ISPICKVAL( Sided__c
,"Double")), (Qty_Used__c * ( (2 *(IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Machine_Click_Charge__c),0,Material_Item__r.Machine_Click_Charge__c) +
IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Color_Click_Charge__c),0,Material_Item__r.Color_Click_Charge__c)) +
IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Labor_Click_Charge__c),0,Material_Item__r.Labor_Click_Charge__c)+
IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Price_Per_Sheet__c),0,Material_Item__r.Price_Per_Sheet__c)
))
),
IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Color__c ,"B&W"),ISPICKVAL( Sided__c
,"Single")), ( Qty_Used__c * ( IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Machine_Click_Charge__c),0,Material_Item__r.Machine_Click_Charge__c) +
IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Labor_Click_Charge__c),0,Material_Item__r.Labor_Click_Charge__c) +
IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.B_W_Click_Charge__c),0,Material_Item__r.B_W_Click_Charge__c) +
IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Price_Per_Sheet__c),0,Material_Item__r.Price_Per_Sheet__c))),
IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Color__c ,"B&W"),ISPICKVAL( Sided__c ,"Double")), (Qty_Used__c * (( (2*(IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Machine_Click_Charge__c),0,Material_Item__r.Machine_Click_Charge__c) + IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.B_W_Click_Charge__c),0,Material_Item__r.B_W_Click_Charge__c)))+
IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Labor_Click_Charge__c),0,Material_Item__r.Labor_Click_Charge__c) +
IF(ISNULL(Material_Item__r.Price_Per_Sheet__c),0,Material_Item__r.Price_Per_Sheet__c)
))),null))))
CustomField.label: Material Sheet Cost Calculations
